# devcontainer.live

> A modern, web-based Dev Container Generator to visually configure and generate `.devcontainer` configurations.

devcontainer.live is a visual tool for building `.devcontainer` setups. It allows users to select from official templates, add features, and configure runtime parameters, providing a real-time preview of the generated configuration files.

## Documentation
- [Development Guide](https://github.com/drehelis/devcontainer.live#development): Detailed instructions on how to use and contribute to the project.
- [Dev Container Specification](https://containers.dev/): The definitive guide to the Development Container standard.

## Features
- **Project Templates:** Integrated support for official Dev Container templates from the Microsoft registry.
- **Visual Features Browser:** Search and add standard features like Docker-in-Docker, Node.js, Python, and more.
- **Live Preview:** Immediate feedback with syntax-highlighted previews of `devcontainer.json`, `Dockerfile`, and `docker-compose.yml`.
- **Configuration Persistence:** Save and share configurations via URL hash.

## Technical Details
- **Frontend Stack:** Vue 3, Vite, Tailwind CSS.
- **Data Source:** Pulls metadata directly from the [Dev Container Index](https://github.com/devcontainers/containers.dev).

## Optional
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/drehelis/devcontainer.live): Full source code and issue tracker.
- [License](https://github.com/drehelis/devcontainer.live/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT License.
